sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88570" key="prosanametre/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσανα-μετρέω</orth>, <sense id="n88570.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">measure up</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:44:23:65" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.23.65</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
